meta.title: Erféro Keoula — Freelance Shopify Developer
meta.description: Shopify & Full-Stack Web Developer. I build fast, custom online stores designed to convert.

hero.badge: Freelance Shopify Developer · Open for new projects
hero.subtitle: I design and build fast, custom Shopify stores made to convert — for brands that refuse the generic theme.

painPoints.title: Your store deserves better than a generic theme
painPoints.subtitle: Most online stores lose sales to problems that are invisible to the naked eye. Here are the most common ones.

items.title: A conversion rate that won't budge
items.description: 1.4% average conversion on Shopify. A generic design pushes away visitors who were ready to buy.

items.title: Almost 1 in 2 carts abandoned
items.description: 70% of visitors abandon their cart before paying — often because of a poorly optimized checkout.

items.title: A slow site that loses mobile shoppers
items.description: Most Shopify traffic is mobile. A slow site means lost sales before a visitor even sees a product.

items.title: A design that doesn't build trust
items.description: A theme that looks like a thousand others doesn't reassure anyone. Credibility is judged within seconds.

items.title: Apps that slow everything down
items.description: Too many poorly optimized apps weigh the site down instead of improving it.

items.title: Invisible on Google
items.description: Without a clean technical structure, your store stays invisible even with great products.

services.title: Full Shopify expertise, from design to code
services.subtitle: Full-stack means I handle everything: design, development, performance and SEO — without you juggling three different providers.

items.title: Custom store builds
items.description: A unique design in Liquid + Tailwind, built for your brand and built to convert — not a recycled theme.

items.title: Redesign & optimization
items.description: Already running a store? I audit it, fix what's holding back sales, and modernize the design.

items.title: Speed & conversion (CRO)
items.description: Faster load times, a simplified checkout flow, and optimization of the elements that actually drive sales.

items.title: Custom features & apps
items.description: Liquid sections, private apps, API integrations (payment, ERP, CRM) when off-the-shelf apps aren't enough.

items.title: Technical SEO & content
items.description: Clean structure, internal linking, content written to rank — backed by my background as an SEO copywriter.

items.title: Maintenance & support
items.description: A living site needs upkeep. Fixes, updates and improvements as your business grows.

process.title: A clear process, from first message to launch
process.subtitle: No surprises, no vague promises. Here's exactly how we'll work together.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.description: We talk about your project, your goals and your budget. Free, no commitment.

steps.title: Proposal & quote
steps.description: You get a clear proposal: scope, timeline, price. Nothing hidden.

steps.title: Design & mockups
steps.description: I design a custom interface, aligned with your brand identity.

steps.title: Shopify development
steps.description: Liquid integration, apps, payments, technical SEO — tested on mobile and desktop.

steps.title: Testing & launch
steps.description: Full checks before launch: speed, checkout flow, tracking.

steps.title: Post-launch support
steps.description: I stay available to tweak, fix and grow the store with you.

faq.title: Everything you're wondering before reaching out

items.q: How much does a Shopify store cost?
items.a: It depends on the project's complexity (number of pages, features, custom design or not). After our discovery call, you'll get a clear, detailed quote — no surprises.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: On average 7 to 14 days for a complete store, depending on complexity and how fast feedback comes back. You get a precise timeline upfront.

items.q: I don't have products or a logo yet, is that a problem?
items.a: Not at all. We can move in parallel: I build the structure while you finalize your branding, or I can help with that too.

items.q: Do you work with clients outside Benin?
items.a: Yes, I work remotely with clients worldwide, in both French and English.

items.q: Do I fully own my store?
items.a: Completely. Your Shopify store is entirely yours, along with any custom code built for you.
I stay available for maintenance, improvements or urgent fixes, with or without an ongoing support plan depending on your needs.

items.q: Can you improve an existing store?
items.a: Yes, auditing and redesigning existing stores is one of my most requested services.
